sourceText: 我们已经完成了最后一次的App-Shell升级（在V2中），我们想提前将新版本的信息提供给Trend&Mantis&UDA团队。
userText: We have already completed the last time App-Shell upgrade (in V2), and we'd like to provide the new versions information to Trend&Mantis&UDA teams in advance.
correctedText: We have already completed the final App-Shell upgrade (in V2), and we'd like to share the new version information with the Trend, Mantis, and UDA teams in advance.
generalAdvice: 用 final 替代 last time 修饰名词；用 share ... with 替代 provide ... to 来主动传达信息给团队。

issues.note: 'last time' is adverbial and cannot directly modify a noun; use 'the final' or 'the last'
issues.suggestion: Practice: 'the final upgrade / release / migration' for planned series endings

issues.note: 'new versions information' should be 'new version information' (singular)
issues.suggestion: When referring to a specific version's info, use singular: 'new version information'

issues.note: 'share ... with' is more natural than 'provide ... to' when proactively informing teams
issues.suggestion: Use 'share [updates/information] with [team]' for proactive information sharing in work contexts
